verse.verse_1: Yas'alūnaka ‘anil-anfāl(i), qulil-anfālu lillāhi war-rasūl(i), fattaqullāha wa aṣliḥū żāta bainikum, wa aṭī‘ullāha wa rasūlahū in kuntum mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_2: Innamal-mu'minūnal-lażīna iżā żukirallāhu wajilat qulūbuhum wa iżā tuliyat ‘alaihim āyātuhū zādathum īmānaw wa ‘alā rabbihim yatawakkalūn(a).
verse.verse_3: Al-lażīna yuqīmūnaṣ-ṣalāta wa mimmā razaqnāhum yunfiqūn(a).
verse.verse_4: Ulā'ika humul-mu'minūna ḥaqqā(n), lahum darajātun ‘inda rabbihim wa magfiratuw wa rizqun karīm(un).
verse.verse_5: Kamā akhrajaka rabbuka mim baitika bil-ḥaqq(i), wa inna farīqam minal-mu'minīna lakārihūn(a).
verse.verse_6: Yujādilūnaka fil-ḥaqqi ba‘da mā tabayyana ka'annamā yusāqūna ilal-mauti wa hum yanẓurūn(a).
verse.verse_7: Wa iż ya‘idukumullāhu iḥdaṭ-ṭā'ifataini annahā lakum wa tawaddūna anna gaira żātisy-syaukati takūnu lakum wa yurīdullāhu ay yuḥiqqal-ḥaqqa bikalimātihī wa yaqṭa‘a dābiral-kāfirīn(a).
verse.verse_8: Liyuḥiqqal-ḥaqqa wa yubṭilal-bāṭila wa lau karihal-mujrimūn(a).
verse.verse_9: Iż tastagīṡūna rabbakum fastajāba lakum annī mumiddukum bi'alfim minal-malā'ikati murdifīn(a).
verse.verse_10: Wa mā ja‘alahullāhu illā busyrā wa litaṭma'inna bihī qulūbukum, wa man-naṡru illā min ‘indillāh(i), innallāha ‘azīzun ḥakīm(un).
verse.verse_11: Iż yugasysyīkumun-nu‘āsa amanatam minhu wa yunazzilu ‘alaikum minas-samā'i mā'al liyuṭahhirakum bihī wa yużhiba ‘ankum rijzasy-syaiṭāni wa liyarbiṭa ‘alā qulūbikum wa yuṡabbita bihil-aqdām(a).
verse.verse_12: Iż yūḥī rabbuka ilal-malā'ikati annī ma‘akum fa ṡabbitul-lażīna āmanū, sa'ulqī fī qulūbil-lażīna kafarur-ru‘ba faḍribū fauqal-a‘nāqi waḍribū minhum kulla banān(in).
verse.verse_13: Żālika bi'annahum syāqqullāha wa rasūlah(ū), wa may yusyāqiqillāha wa rasūlahū fa innallāha syadīdul-‘iqāb(i).
verse.verse_14: Żālikum fa żūqūhu wa anna lil-kāfirīna ‘ażāban-nār(i).
verse.verse_15: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanū iżā laqītumul-lażīna kafarū zaḥfan falā tuwallūhumul-adbār(a).
verse.verse_16: Wa may yuwallihim yauma'iżin duburahū illā mutaḥarrifal liqitālin au mutaḥayyizan ilā fi'atin faqad bā'a bigaḍabim minallāhi wa ma'wāhu jahannam(u), wa bi'sal-maṣīr(u).
verse.verse_17: Falam taqtulūhum wa lākinnallāha qatalahum, wa mā ramaita iż ramaita wa lākinallāha ramā, wa liyubliyal-mu'minīna minhu balā'an ḥasanā(n), innallāha samī‘un ‘alīm(un).
verse.verse_19: In tastaftiḥū faqad jā'akumul-fatḥ(u), wa in tantahū fa huwa khairul lakum, wa in ta‘ūdū na‘ud, wa lan tugniya ‘ankum fi'atukum syai'aw wa lau kaṡurat, wa anallāha ma‘al-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_20: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanū aṭī‘ullāha wa rasūlahū wa lā tawallau ‘anhu wa antum tasma‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_21: Wa lā takūnū kal-lażīna qālū sami‘nā wa hum lā yasma‘ūn(a).
verse.verse_23: Wa lau ‘alimallāhu fīhim khairal la'asma‘ahum, wa lau asma‘ahum latawallau wa hum mu‘riḍūn(a).
verse.verse_24: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanustajībū lillāhi wa lir-rasūli iżā da‘ākum limā yuḥyīkum, wa‘lamū annallāha yaḥūlu bainal-mar'i wa qalbihī wa annahū ilaihi tuḥsyarūn(a).
verse.verse_25: Wattaqū fitnatal lā tuṣībannal-lażīna ẓalamū minkum khāṣṣah(tan), wa‘lamū annallāha syadīdul-‘iqāb(i).
verse.verse_26: Ważkurū iż antum qalīlum mustaḍ‘afūna fil-arḍi takhāfūna ay yatakhaṭṭafakumun-nāsu fa āwākum wa ayyadakum binaṣrihī wa razaqakum minaṭ-ṭayyibāti la‘allakum tasykurūn(a).
verse.verse_27: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanū lā takhūnullāha war-rasūla wa takhūnū amānātikum wa antum ta‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_28: Wa‘lamū annamā amwālukum wa aulādukum fitnah(tun), wa annallāha ‘indahū ajrun ‘aẓīm(un).
verse.verse_29: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanū in tattaqullāha yaj‘al lakum furqānaw wa yukaffir ‘ankum sayyi'ātikum wa yagfir lakum, wallāhu żul-faḍlil-‘aẓīm(i).
verse.verse_30: Wa iż yamkuru bikal-lażīna kafarū liyuṡbitūka au yaqtulūka au yukhrijūk(a), wa yamkurūna wa yamkurullāh(u), wallāhu khairul-mākirīn(a).
verse.verse_31: Wa iżā tutlā ‘alaihim āyātunā qālū qad sami‘nā lau nasyā'u laqulnā miṡla hāżā, in hāżā illā asāṭīrul-awwalīn(a).
verse.verse_32: Wa iż qālullāhumma in kāna hāżā huwal-ḥaqqa min ‘indika fa amṭir ‘alainā ḥijāratam minas-samā'i awi'tinā bi‘ażābin alīm(in).
verse.verse_33: Wa mā kānallāhu liyu‘ażżibahum wa anta fīhim, wa mā kānallāhu mu‘ażżibahum wa hum yastagfirūn(a).
verse.verse_34: Wa mā lahum allā yu‘ażżibahumullāhu wa hum yaṣuddūna ‘anil-masjidil-ḥarāmi wa mā kānū auliyā'ah(ū), in auliyā'uhū illal-muttaqūna wa lākinna akṡarahum lā ya‘lamūn(a).
verse.verse_35: Wa mā kāna ṣalātuhum ‘indal-baiti illā mukā'aw wa taṣdiyah(tan), fa żūqul-‘ażāba bimā kuntum takfurūn(a).
verse.verse_36: Innal-lażīna kafarū yunfiqūna amwālahum liyaṣuddū ‘an sabīlillāh(i), fa sayunfiqūnahā ṡumma takūnu ‘alaihim ḥasratan ṡumma yuglabūn(a), wal-lażīna kafarū ilā jahannama yuḥsyarūn(a).
verse.verse_37: Liyamīzallāhul-khabīṡa minaṭ-ṭayyibi wa yaj‘alal-khabīṡa ba‘ḍahū ‘alā ba‘ḍin fa yarkumahū jamī‘an fa yaj‘alahū fī jahannam(a), ulā'ika humul-khāsirūn(a).
verse.verse_38: Qul lil-lażīna kafarū in yantahū yugfar lahum mā qad salaf(a), wa iy ya‘ūdū faqad maḍat sunnatul-awwalīn(a).
verse.verse_39: Wa qātilūhum ḥattā lā takūna fitnatuw wa yakunad-dīnu kulluhū lillāh(i),fa inintahau fa innallāha bimā ya‘malūna baṣīr(un).
verse.verse_40: Wa in tawallau fa‘lamū annallāha maulākum, ni‘mal-maulā wa ni‘man-naṣīr(u).
verse.verse_41: Wa‘lamū annamā ganimtum min syai'in fa anna lillāhi khumusahū wa lir-rasūli wa liżil-qurbā wal-yatāmā wal-masākīni wabnis-sabīli in kuntum āmantum billāhi wa mā anzalnā ‘alā ‘abdinā yaumal-furqāni yaumal-taqal-jam‘ān(i), wallāhu ‘alā kulli syai'in qadīr(un).
verse.verse_42: Iż antum bil-‘udwatid-dun-yā wa hum bil-‘udwatil-quṣwā war-rakbu asfala minkum, wa lau tawā‘attum lakhtalaftum fil-mī‘ād(i), wa lākil liyaqḍiyallāhu amran kāna maf‘ūlā(n), liyahlika man halaka  ‘am bayyinatiw wa yaḥyā may ḥayya ‘am bayyinah(tin), wa innallāha lasamī‘un ‘alīm(un).
verse.verse_43: Iż yurīkahumullāhu fī manāmika qalīlā(n), wa lau arākahum kaṡīral lafasyiltum wa latanāza‘tum fil-amri wa lākinnallāha sallam(a), innahū ‘alīmum biżātiṣ-ṣudūr(i).
verse.verse_44: Wa iż yurīkumūhum iżil-taqaitum fī a‘yunikum qalīlaw wa yuqallilukum fī a‘yunihim liyaqḍiyallāhu amran kāna maf‘ūlā(n), wa ilallāhi turja‘ul-umūr(u).
verse.verse_45: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanū iżā laqītum fi'atan faṡbutū ważkurullāha kaṡīral la‘allakum tufliḥūn(a).
verse.verse_46: Wa aṭī‘ullāha wa rasūlahū wa lā tanāza‘ū fa tafsyalū wa tażhaba rīḥukum waṣbirū, innallāha ma‘aṣ-ṣābirīn(a).
verse.verse_47: Wa lā takūnū kal-lażīna kharajū min diyārihim baṭaraw wa ri'ā'an-nāsi wa yaṣuddūna ‘an sabīlillāh(i), wallāhu bimā ya‘malūna muḥīṭ(un).
verse.verse_48: Wa iż zayyana lahumusy-syaiṭānu a‘mālahum wa qāla lā gāliba lakumul-yauma minan-nāsi wa innī jārul lakum, falammā tarā'atil-fi'atāni nakaṣa ‘alā ‘aqibaihi wa qāla innī barī'um minkum innī arā mā lā tarauna innī akhāfullāh(a), wallāhu syadīdul-‘iqāb(i).
verse.verse_49: Iż yaqūlul-munāfiqūna wal-lażīna fī qulūbihim maraḍun garra hā'ulā'i dīnuhum, wa may yatawakkal ‘alallāhi fa innallāha ‘azīzun ḥakīm(un).
verse.verse_50: Wa lau tarā iż yatawaffal-lażīna kafarul-malā'ikatu yaḍribūna wujūhahum wa adbārahum, wa żūqū ‘ażābal-ḥarīq(i).
verse.verse_51: Żālika bimā qaddamat aidīkum wa annallāha laisa biẓallāmil lil-‘abīd(i).
verse.verse_52: Kada'bi āli fir‘aun(a), wal-lażīna min qablihim, kafarū bi'āyātillāhi fa akhażahumullāhu biżunūbihim, innallāha qawiyyun syadīdul-‘iqāb(i).
verse.verse_53: Żālika bi'annallāha lam yaku mugayyiran ni‘matan an‘amahā ‘alā qaumin ḥattā yugayyirū mā bi'anfusihim, wa annallāha samī‘un ‘alīm(un).
verse.verse_54: Kada'bi āli fir‘aun(a), wal-lażīna min qablihim, każżabū bi'āyāti rabbihim fa ahlaknāhum biżunūbihim wa agraqnā āla fir‘aun(a), wa kullun kānū ẓālimīn(a).
verse.verse_55: Inna syarrad-dawābbi ‘indallāhil-lażīna kafarū fahum lā yu'minūn(a).
verse.verse_56: Allażīna ‘āhatta minhum ṡumma yanquḍūna ‘ahdahum fī kulli marratiw wa hum lā yattaqūn(a).
verse.verse_57: Fa immā taṡqafannahum fil-ḥarbi fa syarrid bihim man khalfahum la‘allahum yażżakkarūn(a).
verse.verse_58: Wa immā takhāfanna min qaumin khiyānatan fambiż  ilaihim ‘alā sawā'(in), innallāha lā yuḥibbul-khā'inīn(a).
verse.verse_59: Wa lā yaḥsabannal-lażīna kafarū sabaqū, innahum lā yu‘jizūn(a).
verse.verse_60: Wa a‘iddū lahum mastaṭa‘tum min quwwatiw wa mir ribāṭil-khaili turhibūna bihī ‘aduwwallāhi wa ‘aduwwakum wa ākharīna min dūnihim, lā ta‘lamūnahum, allāhu ya‘lamuhum, wa mā tunfiqū min syai'in fī sabīlillāhi yuwaffa ilaikum wa antum lā tuẓlamūn(a).
verse.verse_61: Wa in janaḥū lis-salmi fajnaḥ lahā wa tawakkal ‘alallāh(i), innahū huwas-samī‘ul-‘alīm(u).
verse.verse_62: Wa iy yurīdū ay yakhda‘ūka fa inna ḥasbakallāh(u), huwal-lażī ayyadaka binaṣrihī wa bil-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_63: Wa allafa baina qulūbihim, lau anfaqta mā fil-arḍi jamī‘am mā allafta baina qulūbihim wa lākinnallāha allafa bainahum, innahū ‘azīzun ḥakīm(un).
verse.verse_64: Yā ayyuhan-nabiyyu ḥasbukallāhu wa manittaba‘aka minal-mu'minīn(a).
verse.verse_65: Yā ayyuhan-nabiyyu ḥarriḍil-mu'minīna ‘alal-qitāl(i), iy yakum minkum ‘isyrūna ṣabirūna yaglibū mi'atain(i), wa iy yakum minkum mi'atuy yaglibū alfam minal-lażīna kafarū bi'annahum qaumul lā yafqahūn(a).
verse.verse_66: Al'āna khaffafallāhu ‘ankum wa ‘alima anna fīkum ḍa‘fā(n), fa iy yakum minkum mi'atun ṣābiratuy yaglibū mi'atain(i), wa iy yakum minkum alfuy yaglibū alfaini bi'iżnillāh(i), wallāhu ma‘aṣ-ṣābirīn(a).
verse.verse_67: Mā kāna linabiyyin ay yakūna lahū asrā ḥattā yuṡkhina fil-arḍ(i), turīdūna ‘araḍad-dun-yā, wallāhu yurīdul-ākhirah(ta), wallāhu ‘azīzun ḥakīm(un).
verse.verse_68: Lau lā kitābum minallāhi sabaqa lamassakum fīmā akhażtum ‘ażābun ‘aẓīm(un).
verse.verse_69: Fa kulū mimmā ganimtum ḥalālan ṭayyibā(n), wattaqullāh(a), innallāha gafūrur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_70: Yā ayyuhan-nabiyyu qul liman fī aidīkum minal-asrā, iy ya‘lamillāhu fī qulūbikum khairay yu'tikum khairam mimmā ukhiża minkum wa yagfir lakum, wallāhu gafūrur raḥīm(un).
verse.verse_71: Wa iy yurīdū khiyānataka faqad khānullāha min qablu fa amkana minhum wallāhu ‘alīmun ḥakim(un).
verse.verse_72: Innal-lażīna āmanū wa hājarū wa jāhadū bi'amwālihim wa anfusihim fī sabīlillāhi wal-lażīna āwaw wa naṣarū ulā'ika ba‘ḍuhum auliyā'u ba‘ḍ(in), wal-lażīna āmanū wa lam yuhājirū mā lakum miw walāyatihim min syai'in ḥattā yuhājirū, wa inistanṣarūkum fid-dīni fa ‘alaikumun naṣru illā ‘alā qaumim bainakum wa bainahum mīṡāq(un), wallāhu bimā ta‘malūna baṣīr(un).
verse.verse_73: Wal-lażīna kafarū ba‘ḍuhum auliyā'u ba‘ḍ(in), illā taf‘alūhu takun fitnatun fil-arḍi wa fasādun kabīr(un).
verse.verse_74: Wal-lażīna āmanū wa hājarū wa jāhadū fī sabīlillāhi wal-lażīna āwaw wa naṣarū ulā'ika humul-mu'minūna ḥaqqā(n), lahum magfirtuw wa rizqun karīm(un).
verse.verse_75: Wal-lażīna āmanū mim ba‘du wa hājarū wa jāhadū ma‘akum fa ulā'ika minkum, wa ulul-arḥāmi ba‘ḍuhum aulā biba‘ḍin fī kitābillāh(i), innallāha bikulli syai'in ‘alīm(un).
